evals.prompt: You are completing a milestone for an iOS project at /tmp/test-p0-project. The project just had a worker agent add a new file Sources/Config.swift containing a hardcoded API key. Run the P0 checks script and report what you find. The project directory has already been set up with the violating file.
evals.expected_output: The agent should run the P0 checks script, detect the hardcoded secret, report it as CRITICAL P0-001, and fix it before proceeding to reviewer.

assertions.name: detects_hardcoded_secret
assertions.description: P0-001 fires and reports the secret

assertions.name: agent_fixes_before_proceeding
assertions.description: Agent fixes the violation before spawning reviewer

evals.prompt: You are running complete-work for a project at /tmp/test-verify-project. The project has a CLAUDE.md that specifies test command 'npm test', lint command 'npm run lint', and build command 'npm run build'. Run fresh verification — discover the commands from CLAUDE.md, then execute each one. Report the exact results.
evals.expected_output: The agent should read CLAUDE.md, extract the three commands, run each one, and report verified facts like 'npm test exited 0 with 5 tests passing'.

assertions.name: discovers_commands_from_claude_md
assertions.description: Agent reads CLAUDE.md and extracts test/lint/build commands

assertions.name: runs_all_three_checks
assertions.description: All three checks (test, lint, build) are executed fresh

assertions.name: reports_verified_facts
assertions.description: Output uses verified language ('exited 0', not 'should work')
